title: Design irrigation systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design irrigation systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine design requirements

pcs.text: Analyse water quantity and quality needs for a particular crop or situation so that an estimation can be made for sufficiency and timeliness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse water quantity and quality needs for a particular crop or situation so that an estimation can be made for sufficiency and timeliness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse water quantity and quality needs for a particular crop or situation so that an estimation can be made for sufficiency and timeliness.

pcs.text: Evaluate water transfer, recharge, reuse and harvesting systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate water transfer, recharge, reuse and harvesting systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate water transfer, recharge, reuse and harvesting systems.

pcs.text: Determine water collecting and storing processes that do not degrade the water quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine water collecting and storing processes that do not degrade the water quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine water collecting and storing processes that do not degrade the water quality.

pcs.text: Determine construction specifications that satisfy organisational and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine construction specifications that satisfy organisational and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine construction specifications that satisfy organisational and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Investigate regional geology and geography to predict irrigation system parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate regional geology and geography to predict irrigation system parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate regional geology and geography to predict irrigation system parameters.

pcs.text: Conduct a site investigation to assess type of soil, depth of soil, depth of ground water, soil and water salinity, and structural or chemical impediments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a site investigation to assess type of soil, depth of soil, depth of ground water, soil and water salinity, and structural or chemical impediments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a site investigation to assess type of soil, depth of soil, depth of ground water, soil and water salinity, and structural or chemical impediments.

pcs.text: Determine the most cost effective irrigation system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the most cost effective irrigation system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the most cost effective irrigation system.

pcs.text: Document design calculations and decisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document design calculations and decisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document design calculations and decisions.

pcs.text: Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine design requirements

elements.title: Define pumping and power systems

pcs.text: Identify pumps that can deliver water efficiently when needed, from the water storage at the flow and at the pressure required to operate the distribution system to the design specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pumps that can deliver water efficiently when needed, from the water storage at the flow and at the pressure required to operate the distribution system to the design specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pumps that can deliver water efficiently when needed, from the water storage at the flow and at the pressure required to operate the distribution system to the design specifications.

pcs.text: Select pump motor combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select pump motor combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select pump motor combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application.

pcs.text: Determine energy requirements and layout of electricity lines and check with local authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine energy requirements and layout of electricity lines and check with local authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine energy requirements and layout of electricity lines and check with local authorities.

pcs.text: Optimise the relationship between capital and operational costs including a comparison of energy sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Optimise the relationship between capital and operational costs including a comparison of energy sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Optimise the relationship between capital and operational costs including a comparison of energy sources.

pcs.text: Document performance indicators, design calculations and decisions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document performance indicators, design calculations and decisions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document performance indicators, design calculations and decisions.

pcs.text: Design construction specifications that define work required to make suitable pumping and power systems available
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design construction specifications that define work required to make suitable pumping and power systems available?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design construction specifications that define work required to make suitable pumping and power systems available.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Define pumping and power systems

elements.title: Design an irrigation distribution system

pcs.text: Investigate regional geology and geography so that a prediction can be made on the sustainability of irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate regional geology and geography so that a prediction can be made on the sustainability of irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate regional geology and geography so that a prediction can be made on the sustainability of irrigation.

pcs.text: Evaluate distribution systems and design with respect to a range of key variables
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate distribution systems and design with respect to a range of key variables?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate distribution systems and design with respect to a range of key variables.

pcs.text: Size pipes, valves and fittings according to design system specifications so that capital cost is balanced against operation costs over the anticipated system life
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Size pipes, valves and fittings according to design system specifications so that capital cost is balanced against operation costs over the anticipated system life?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Size pipes, valves and fittings according to design system specifications so that capital cost is balanced against operation costs over the anticipated system life.

pcs.text: Calculate and document flows, water levels and pressures so that they are within the acceptable tolerances for optimum performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and document flows, water levels and pressures so that they are within the acceptable tolerances for optimum performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and document flows, water levels and pressures so that they are within the acceptable tolerances for optimum performance.

pcs.text: Include mechanisms for controlling and adjusting pressure and confirm isolation valves to direct water to areas with different irrigation schedules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include mechanisms for controlling and adjusting pressure and confirm isolation valves to direct water to areas with different irrigation schedules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include mechanisms for controlling and adjusting pressure and confirm isolation valves to direct water to areas with different irrigation schedules.

pcs.text: Design distribution and monitoring systems to meet industry recommendations and calculate distribution system flow and velocity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design distribution and monitoring systems to meet industry recommendations and calculate distribution system flow and velocity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design distribution and monitoring systems to meet industry recommendations and calculate distribution system flow and velocity.

pcs.text: Design construction plans and specifications that define the work required to achieve the required standards of uniformity and efficiency of water application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design construction plans and specifications that define the work required to achieve the required standards of uniformity and efficiency of water application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design construction plans and specifications that define the work required to achieve the required standards of uniformity and efficiency of water application.

pcs.text: Document irrigation distribution system design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document irrigation distribution system design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document irrigation distribution system design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Design an irrigation distribution system

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate labour requirements based upon documented work schedule with reasonable allowance for variances in work schedules.

pcs.text: Base costing attributed to each component on quoted information from suppliers, or sound analysis of individual elements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Base costing attributed to each component on quoted information from suppliers, or sound analysis of individual elements.
